text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... So unhealthy habits can bring on acne.
It's best to maintain a well-regulated lifest—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Does that mean I don't have a
well-regulated lifestyle?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That means even if I try to enforce the school
rules, everyone can just tell me that I'm breaking
the rules as well!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm a disgrace to the disciplinary committee and
discipline as a whole!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Bamboo Memory is suffering from skin
problems.
